message.content:
I need to run the FPGA perf test for the pure VQMACC tiling baseline (before the VD4DOTS commit dc9f3d62) to get per-shape cycle counts for conv_1x1_HWC_s8_s8_s8_asym_bias_fast_any.

Steps:
1. Create a temporary worktree from the commit BEFORE dc9f3d62 (its parent): `git worktree add /tmp/libnn_baseline dc9f3d62~1`
2. Copy the modified test file (with #if !ENA_MEASURE_PERF removed) from the main repo: copy /home/nick/work/libnn/Examples/unit_func/t_conv_1x1_HWC_s8_s8_s8_asym_bias_fast_any.c to the worktree's same path
3. Build libnn in the worktree: `cd /tmp/libnn_baseline && export PATH="/local/nick/SW_Release_cp/ast530/nds64le-elf-newlib-v5d/bin:$PATH" && /usr/bin/bash build.sh AX45MPV`
4. Copy the built libnn.a back to the worktree root (it should already be there)
5. Run the perf test: `mkdir -p /tmp/libnn_baseline/build_perf && cd /tmp/libnn_baseline/build_perf && /usr/bin/bash ../test_perf.sh ax45mpv riscv64-elf-gcc BOARD conv_1x1_HWC_s8_s8_s8_asym_bias_fast_any`
6. Return the full output including all per-shape cycle counts
7. Clean up: `git worktree remove /tmp/libnn_baseline`

The FPGA board is at sw-boards.andestech.com:1116. The test_perf.sh script handles toolchain PATH setup automatically.

IMPORTANT: Return the FULL test output so I can see all 9 shapes' inst and cycle counts.

content.text:
I'll execute these steps sequentially.

**Step 1: Create worktree from parent of dc9f3d62**

input.description: Create git worktree at parent of dc9f3d62

Build libnn for AX45MPV in the baseline worktree

content.text:
Here are the full FPGA results for the **VQMACC tiling baseline** (commit 0bbb5ecc, parent of dc9f3d62) on `conv_1x1_HWC_s8_s8_s8_asym_bias_fast_any`:

| # | Shape (HxW, Cin, Cout, batch, stride) | Inst | Cycles |
|---|---------------------------------------|------|--------|
| 1 | 9x11, ch=2055, out=5, batch=3, s1x1 | 2,141,453 | 3,505,367 |
| 2 | 5x7, ch=2055, out=7, batch=1, s1x1 | 269,611 | 450,365 |
| 3 | 9x11, ch=7, out=7, batch=2, s3x2 | 5,994 | 10,319 |
| 4 | 7x9, ch=1031, out=5, batch=1, s2x3 | 65,176 | 117,281 |
| 5 | 34x56, ch=253, out=5, batch=1, s3x2 | 304,449 | 510,061 |
| 6 | 33x57, ch=1031, out=5, batch=1, s3x2 | 1,186,290 | 1,973,037 |
| 7 | 17x19, ch=1031, out=5, batch=1, s1x1 | 1,176,449 | 1,930,233 |
| 8 | 34x56, ch=1031, out=2050, batch=1, s3x2 | 10,719,694 | 21,348,689 |
| 9 | 14x16, ch=512, out=32, batch=2, s1x1 | 807,631 | 1,119,926 |

All 9 shapes passed accuracy checking. The worktree has been cleaned up.
